overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand Gothic banquet hall resembling the Great Hall from Harry Potter, filled with students in dark robes dining at long house tables. The scene is illuminated by numerous hanging candle chandeliers and features high stone arches, tall windows, and elaborate feast spreads. The camera maintains a steady, elevated view of the dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with house dining tables and floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the banquet hall from an elevated fixed vantage point overlooking the dining area

notable_agents.action: group of students in dark robes seated at long tables eating and conversing
figures in dark clothing walking between the dining tables

entered.detail: tall arched windows with stone tracery allowing dim light into the hall
numerous hanging chandeliers with lit candles suspended from the high ceiling
lengthy wooden house tables arranged in rows with benches
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
colorful plates of food, goblets, and serving dishes covering the nearest table

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand Gothic banquet hall filled with dining students. The warm candlelight from numerous hanging chandeliers illuminates the long oak tables and stone architecture. The crowd sits densely packed at the house tables, eating and conversing, while the camera maintains a steady elevated perspective over the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective over a grand Gothic banquet hall filled with the warm glow of candlelight. It begins with a cinematic view of the vast space, where numerous hanging chandeliers cast a golden light across the stone architecture. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on the long oak tables densely packed with students in dark robes who are eating and conversing. The scene remains poised in this atmospheric stillness, capturing the scale of the hall and the lively energy of the crowd beneath the high arches.
